home.heroSubtitle: For over a decade, Genius Soccer Foundation has been shaping the next generation of African footballers through discipline, education, and passion.
home.programmesSubtitle: Three age categories, one mission: develop complete footballers.
home.ctaText: Applications are open. Take the first step toward your football career.

about.title: About Genius Soccer Foundation
about.intro: Founded in 2012 in Douala, GSF has grown into one of Central Africa's leading youth football academies.
about.historyText: Since 2012, we have trained over 600 young players across three age categories, with a strong emphasis on academic excellence alongside athletic development.
about.philosophyText: We believe football is a vehicle for life. Every player who passes through GSF leaves not only as a better footballer, but as a better person.
about.facilitiesText: Our training ground in Deido features two full-size pitches, a gym, video analysis room, and academic classrooms.

programmes.title: Our Programmes
programmes.subtitle: Structured development pathways for every age group.
programmes.methodologyText: GSF uses a periodised training model built around technical, tactical, physical, and mental pillars.
programmes.bootCampText: Every July, GSF opens its gates to 80 selected young talents for an intensive 3-week residential programme.

categories.u10Desc: Fundamentals of the game: technique, coordination, and love for football.
categories.u13Desc: Tactical awareness, position specialisation, and competitive play.
categories.u16Desc: High-performance training aimed at professional pathways.

bootCamp.title: GSF Boot Camp
bootCamp.subtitle: Three weeks to bring out your very best.
bootCamp.description: The annual Boot Camp gathers Central Africa's top young talents for an intensive scouting and development camp.
